ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sandwiches" (
  "sandwich_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sandwich */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sandwich */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sandwich */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the sandwich */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sandwich */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the sandwich */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sandwich can be customized */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the sandwich */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sandwich is available for order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sandwich_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the ingredient */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ingredient */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the ingredient */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the ingredient */,
  "is_allergen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is an allergen */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if registered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address for delivery (if applicable) */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Expected delivery time (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "sandwich_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sandwich */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the sandwich */,
  "custom_instructions" TEXT /* Any special instructions for the item */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_sandwich_id FOREIGN KEY ("sandwich_id") REFERENCES sandwiches ("sandwich_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_item_ingredients" (
  "order_item_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item ingredient */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_item_ingredients_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_item_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the ingredient was last reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message contained in the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request that triggered the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
